name: Nonexistent date appointment request
description: Patient attempts to schedule an appointment on February 30th, which doesn't exist.
goal: Schedule a dental cleaning on February 30th; agree to the first available real date after clarification.
behavior: Sound confident and definitive about the date
Express surprise if told the date doesn't exist
Agree to book on the next available date after understanding the error
success_criteria: Agent recognizes and corrects the nonexistent date
Agent provides clear information about the correct calendar dates
Agent successfully offers a valid appointment date
orchestrator_hint: Patient requests an appointment on February 30th, a non-existent date.
